key_milestones: H1: monorepo structure (apps/, packages/) merged to main
H3: createQueryCache, storage adapters, dependency injection
H4: Expo scaffold, React Navigation auth-aware, SecureStore chunked
H5.1: Mobile tabs, logout flow, design tokens mobile
lessons_learned: DEVFLOW state.json checkpoint protocol is CRITICAL — must update at P0/C0/C2/C5 boundaries
Async adapter pattern enables cross-platform code reuse without implementation variance
Dependency injection prevents platform coupling; all adapters/config are created via factories
React Navigation initialRouteName is only evaluated at mount — rendering conditional screens fixes implicit routing bugs
SecureStore chunked storage is necessary but not sufficient for session persistence — need explicit getSession() + onAuthStateChange
Layer-by-layer isolation debugging (View → Navigation → State → Storage) is more effective than trial-and-error
Design tokens in JavaScript (not CSS) enable cross-platform reuse
Lock file synchronization in CI is critical for monorepo consistency

memory_state_at_distillation.hot_bootstrap_items: R-001, R-002, R-003, R-021, R-022, AP-H04 through AP-H10 (newest, highest trigger frequency)

next_distillation_signals: H5.2-H5.5 will likely trigger 8-12 new AP entries (common patterns: state management, performance optimization)
Rules R-158/159/160 are recently added and should remain hot for 12+ weeks
AP-H04 through AP-H10 have high trigger frequency — monitor for demotion candidates only if triggers plateau
Design tokens pattern (R from H2) should be considered for global_base export after H5 completion validates cross-platform applicability
